notes: Canonical integrity gate. Must output DEDUP_OUT + QUARANTINE_DUPES (optional) + AUDIT. Replace entrypoint with your current working v3 script if named differently.
Splits deduped canon into UNKNOWN-only + BUILDING_ONLY buckets and emits an audit. Replace entrypoint if your extractor filename differs.
Strict suffix-alias authority attach for UNKNOWN events. Emits upgrades-only + audit.
Optional: range endpoint attach for UNKNOWN events. Low yield after suffix engine; keep for completeness.
Merges upgrades-only into canon by event_id. Must preserve rows_in==rows_out; emits audit.
Attaches BUILDING_ONLY records deterministically using building_key scope. Emits upgrades-only + audit.
Promotes ATTACHED_BUILDING to ATTACHED_A with attach_scope/precision retained + flags. Emits audit.
